  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AnimationComponent
    Manages the animations, health bar, and rendering for a game entity.
    Coin
    The Coin class represents a collectible coin object in the game.
    Component
    Abstract base class for all components that can be attached to an entity.
    Constants
    The Constants class holds constant values for various aspects of the game, including object types, * enemy attributes, UI settings, and player actions.
    Constants.Directions
     
    Constants.EnemyConstants
     
    Constants.ObjectConstants
     
    Constants.PlayerConstants
     
    Constants.UI
     
    Constants.UI.Buttons
     
    Constants.UI.URMButtons
     
    DefaultEntityFactory
    Factory class responsible for creating different entities.
    Enemy
    Abstract base class for all enemy entities.
    EnemyManager
    Manages all enemy entities in the game.
    Entity
    Abstract base class for all game entities.
    EntityFactory
    Interface for factories.
    EntityType
    Enums for factory.
    Game
    The Game class is the main game loop and window manager, handling the initialization and execution of the game.
    GameContainer
    The GameContainer class represents a container object in the game
    GameObject
    The GameObject class represents a general game object that has a position, hitbox, * and animation.
    GameObjectFactory
    The GameObjectFactory class is responsible for creating instances of game objects * based on their type.
    GameOverOverlay
    The GameOverOverlay class represents the overlay displayed when the player loses the game.
    GameOverOverlayTest
     
    GamePanel
    GamePanel is the main panel that handles the rendering and user input (mouse and keyboard) for the game.
    GameState
    Enums for different gamestates in game.
    GameWindow
    GameWindow is the main window for the game, managing the game panel and handling window focus events.
    HelpMethods
    The HelpMethods class contains various utility methods that help with game logic
    IGameObject
    Interface for GameObjects.
    InputComponent
    Component that handles player input and updates the entity's animation.
    KeyboardInputs
    The KeyboardInputs class handles key events and delegates the actions to the corresponding game state.
    Level
    The Level class represents a game level, including its data, enemies, items, and environmental objects.
    LevelCompOverlay
    The LevelCompOverlay class represents the overlay displayed when the player completes a level.
    LevelCompOverlayTest
     
    LevelLoadException
     
    LevelManager
    The LevelManager class handles the loading, building, and drawing of levels in the game.
    LoadSave
    This class is responsible for loading various game resources, such as sprite atlases, level images, and other assets.
    MainClass
    MainClass serves as the entry point to launch the game.
    Menu
    The Menu class represents the main menu state of the game.
    MenuButton
    The MenuButton class represents a button in the game's menu.
    MouseInputs
    The MouseInputs class handles mouse events and delegates the actions to the corresponding game state.
    MovementComponent
    Component responsible for handling horizontal movement and direction of an entity.
    ObjectManager
    The ObjectManager class is responsible for managing and handling game objects such as potions, containers, and traps.
    Orc
    Represents an Orc enemy in the game.
    PauseButton
    The PauseButton class represents a button in the pause screen.
    PauseOverlay
    The PauseOverlay class represents the overlay displayed when the game is paused.
    PhysicsComponent
    Component responsible for handling gravity, jumping, and falling physics of an entity.
    Player
    Class representing the player entity in the game.
    Playing
    The Playing class represents the gameplay state, handling player actions, level progression, and overlays.
    Potion
    The Potion class represents a potion object in the game.
    PotionTest
     
    RenderComponent
    Component responsible for rendering an entity's animations.
    ResourceLoadException
     
    ResourceNotFoundException
     
    ResourceReadException
     
    SpriteAtlas
    This class is responsible for loading a sprite sheet.
    State
    The State class represents a base class for different game states, holding a reference to the main game.
    StateMethods
    Interface for States.
    Trap
    The Trap class represents a trap object in the game.
    TrapTest
     
    UrmButton
    The UrmButton class represents a button with different states (normal, hovered, pressed)
